global_description: A small, slender songbird with a predominantly olive-green body. It features a subtle orange crown patch on its head, which is often hidden. The bird has a pointed beak, pale underparts, and a slightly forked tail. Its wings and back are a muted green, blending into its natural habitat.

part_details.head: Olive-green with a hidden orange crown patch, small and rounded.
part_details.beak: Short, pointed, and slightly curved, suitable for insectivory.
part_details.body: Slender and streamlined, predominantly olive-green with pale underparts.
part_details.wings: Muted green, blending with the back, providing camouflage.
part_details.tail: Slightly forked, aiding in agile flight.

spatial_relations: The orange crown patch is located on the top of the head.
The pointed beak extends from the front of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
